name: Excem Capital Partners Sociedad de Inversion Residencial Socimi, S.A.
summary: Excem Capital Partners Sociedad de Inversion Residencial Socimi, S.A. is a Spanish REIT (Socimi) focused on residential real estate investments. The company acquires, renovates, and manages residential properties for rental purposes, primarily in urban areas. Excem Capital Partners is based in Spain.
